title: Server - Landshark
description: Are you a passionate and customer-focused individual with a love for hospitality? Join our team as a Server and be an integral part of creating exceptional dining experiences for our guests. With high energy and enthusiasm, you will have the opportunity to showcase your interpersonal skills and provide outstanding service that leaves a lasting impression. From recommending delectable menu items to ensuring a seamless dining journey, you will play a vital role in delivering an unforgettable culinary experience. As part of our dedicated team, you will thrive in a fast-paced environment and have the chance to build meaningful connections with our guests. If you have a genuine passion for hospitality, impeccable attention to detail, and a knack for creating memorable moments, this is your chance to shine in a rewarding and dynamic role!

title: Deli Clerk
description: As a Deli Clerk, no one day is ever the same. You are someone who prides themselves on exceptional customer service and their knowledge of deli meats, cheeses, salads, sandwiches, dips, and gourmet and hot case food items.  You take great care in preparing delicious food that will keep our customers returning to the store time and time again. You will have the opportunity throughout your day to utilize various tools like our meat and cheese slicers, food scales, fryers, ovens, and/or cash registers. As a Deli Clerk, you guide, inspire, and make every guest’s visit memorable.  If you have smiles to share, we'd love to have you on our team.

title: Multiple Positions Available
location: We have 5 locations in South Lake Tahoe
description:
Ski Pass Reimbursement with Full Time Commitment
Pro Deals from 100s of Brands
Exclusive Discounts with Local Partners
Free Tunes and Discounted Rentals for Friends and Family
Bonuses based on Performance
application_instructions:
Please contact Casey Buckley with Powder House HR
humanresources4045@gmail.com

title: Temporary Customer Service Representative
company: South Lake Tahoe Public Utilities District
description: Under the direction of the Customer Service Supervisor, performs a variety of routine billing, accounting and financial duties related to customer accounts for water and sewer services. Also, handles residential plan review, customer relations either in person, over the phone or via written correspondence and revenue collection, along with other issues, often in emergency circumstances or with customers who are upset or distressed.

title: FOH (Front of House) Server
description:
Our team at Gastromaniac Pizza & Pasta prides ourselves in providing a great casual dining experience with authentic Italian homemade delicacies to our customers. Looking for motivated individuals who are passionate about customer service, and enjoy working in a fast paced, team oriented, and high volume environment.

Perks include employee benefits, flexible schedule, and learning about authentic Italian cuisine & wine!

Requirements/Qualifications:
* Previous experience in hospitality/restaurant industry is REQUIRED
* Experience and knowledge of Italian cuisine (Pasta & Pizza) is a PLUS
* Experience and knowledge of Italian wines is a PLUS
* +21 years old

*WE ARE NOT A J1 authorized employer at this time.*

title: Server
description:
Are you:
-Upbeat, hardworking, dependable?
-Thrive working in team environments?
-Want to join one of Tahoe's best restaurants?

Prior experience required and reliable winter transportation a must!
application_instructions: Apply in person or email resume to getawaycafetahoe@gmail.com

title: General Maintenance Tech
description:
-Assist with seasonal tasks
-Basic mechanical or handyman skills preferred, but wil ltrain the right candidate

title: Administrative Assistant and Guest Services
description:
-Proficient with financial tools: Excel, Google Sheets, accounting platforms
-Analytical skills: ability to identify discrepancies

title: Sandwich Artist
description:
If you love food and want others to love their food, becoming one of our sandwich artists is exactly for you!
We have flexible hours, a positive work environment and competitive pay.

title: Morning Cook
description:
Social House is looking for a reliable, motivated Morning Cook to join our team! If you’re passionate about good food, enjoy working in a fast-paced environment, and have a positive attitude, we want to hear from you.

🔸 Schedule: 6:30/7:00 AM – 3:00/3:30 PM

✨ What We’re Looking For:
Previous kitchen or line-cook experience required
Strong work ethic and ability to stay organized during busy service periods
Ability to follow recipes, maintain consistency, and uphold food-safety standards
Dependable and punctual
Team-oriented attitude with good communication skills

🔧 Responsibilities Include:
Preparing breakfast and lunch menu items
Setting up and stocking stations before service
Maintaining a clean and orderly kitchen
Assisting with prep work
Following proper food handling and sanitation procedures
If you're ready to be part of a supportive, energetic team and start your mornings with purpose, we’d love to meet you!
application_instructions:
Drop resume off in person or submit here: https://socialhousetahoe.com/
(Link to apply at the bottom of the homepage)

title: Retail Sales Associate (Temporary)
description: Responsible for delivering a highly satisfied customer experience proven by engaging and interacting with all customers, embodying customer experience principles and philosophy, and maintaining a clean and organized store environment. Adheres to all operational, merchandise, and loss prevention standards. May be cross-trained to work in multiple areas of the store in order to support the needs of the business.

title: Store Associate
description: The Retail Store Associate position provides an opportunity, in a leading retail setting, to excel in a growing, high impact, customer focused role, working both independently and as a member of a team, to positively impact the lives of others.

title: Veterinary Receptionist/Assistant
description: We are looking for a compassionate and enthusiastic veterinary receptionist to join our team in South Lake Tahoe. Working well within a team and developing strong bonds with our dedicated clients are a must. Tasks would be answering phone, checking clients in and out, client communication, ect.
application_instructions: Please drop of resume in person or email reception@bluelakevet.com

title: Cookie Delivery Driver
description: As a Delivery Driver, you are our “Boots on the ground!”, and the main face that our Insomniacs see outside of the bakery! You give the word “Delivery” a whole new meaning by delivering the Cookie Magic to our fans wherever they are.

title: Cookie Crew
description: As a member of the Cookie Crew you are the ultimate Insomniac. Not only are you the point person at the front of the store for interacting with our customers, but you also get to bake all of our awesome Warm and Delicious cookies as well!

title: Shift Lead
description: As a Shift Leader, you are the captain of our bakery day or night! You understand what it takes to “Own the Night” (and beyond), by predicting the flow of business during a successful shift. Your hands-on leadership style should not only include building orders, suggestive selling, baking, and interacting with customers – it will also mean taking pride in knowing that your prowess as a leading Insomniac attributes to a productive and fun night for your store!

title: Shift Lead
description:
We’re looking for a lead to join our team. This person will work front and back of house, and specialize in an aspect of the business.

This full time position includes a benefits package.

title: Barista/Register/Back of House
description:
Train in Cuppa Tahoe front, back, & barista services with associated pay increases
Client interaction
Talk “books” with clientele
Food & beverage preparation
Cashier responsibilities
Social media participation

title: Night Cleaner
description:
Clean the front and back of house
Focus on deep cleaning different areas of the store
This is done during the hours that we’re closed, and has no customer interaction.

title: Barista
description:
RESPONSIBILITIES

POS and taking orders
Making coffee and food items on the menu
Pouring beautiful coffee drinks (we will train you on latte art)
Stocking and prep
Opening, closing and mid-shift tasks
Multitasking during busy days
Friendly and engaging with customers — remembering names and drink orders, giving outdoor activity recommendations
Up-selling retail coffee and merchandise
Understanding the DRINK COFFEE DO STUFF brand story and consistently growing in specialty coffee knowledge
application_instructions: Email us at jobs@drinkcoffeedostuff.com with subject title "Barista" — please include a short introduction, indicating which shop you'd like to call home, with an updated resumé attached

title: Barista
description: The Barista at Edgewood Tahoe Resort will have a deep appreciation for specialty coffee, a keen eye for detail, and a commitment to outstanding customer service. The Barista ensures all beverages are prepared, presented, and served according to the resort's standards, and is dedicated to delivering an exceptional coffee experience.

title: Busser/Food Runner
description: The Busser/Food Runner is responsible for maintaining a clean and organized dining area, assisting servers with various tasks, and delivering food from the kitchen to customers. This role ensures guests receive exceptional dining experience by helping to keep the restaurant running smoothly, efficiently, and with excellent customer service.

title: Host
description: As a Host at Edgewood Tahoe Resort, you will be responsible for greeting and seating guests in a polite, friendly, and professional manner. The Host ensures that the guest experience is pleasant from the moment guests arrive until they are seated. The Host plays an important role in managing reservations, maintaining a smooth flow of guests, and supporting the front-of-house staff.

title: Retail Associate
description: The Retail Staff will be responsible for processing the sale of Tubing Hill tickets, pre packaged foods, and retail items. Staff will lead by providing outstanding customer experience through professionalism, extensive training and a friendly, welcoming demeanor.

title: Tubing Hill Crew Member
description:
Tubing Hill Crew Members will be responsible for assisting in the daily operations of the Snow Tubing department at Tube Tahoe.
Staff will lead by providing outstanding customer experience through professionalism, extensive training and a friendly, welcoming demeanor.

title: Retail Merchandise Associate
description: Responsible for delivering a highly satisfied customer experience proven by engaging and interacting with all customers, embodying customer experience principles and philosophy, and maintaining a clean and organized store environment. Adheres to all operational, merchandise, and loss prevention standards. May be cross-trained to work in multiple areas of the store in order to support the needs of the business.

title: Retail Associate
description: The Part-time Retail Associate performs management-assigned duties, which may include but may not be limited to, stocking and maintaining a store section, carry-out services and store cleaning.

title: Service Clerk
description: The Service Clerk reports to the Store Manager/Senior Assistant Manager and is responsible for maintaining carts, assisting customers with purchases and assistance to their cars as requested, checking prices on products, returning merchandise to store shelves, parking lot and store maintenance.

title: Vacation Rental Cleaner
description:
The house cleaner is responsible for cleaning vacation rentals throughout the service region (South Lake Tahoe). This position has the opportunity to work in the North Lake Tahoe area (Truckee/Donner) with additional pay benefits if interested.



VRA has created a system which automates your schedule, houses, linen, and provides all equipment needed. We love structure, and set schedules (not changing every week). While this position is independent in nature (working solo), we take pride in our cleaning team for working together, and helping each other when in need to get the job done, stress free.

title: Vacation Rental Dispatch Specialist
description: As our Dispatch Specialist, you’ll be the communication hub of our company—supporting field operations, assisting staff, clients, responding to guest needs, and ensuring that everything flows where it should. You’ll juggle calls, messages, emails, and logistics with efficiency and professionalism, solving what you can and routing the rest to the right place.  Processing service tickets, issues, ordering and processing inventory for the homes is to be expected.    This is an excellent role for someone organized, responsive, and eager to support a fast-paced team. Experience is helpful but not required—we’ll train the right person.

title: Grocery Clerk- Freight
description: Job Summary: Receiving, Breaking Down, Stocking, Rotating, Merchandising, Facing & Presentation Perfection in all of Grocery Department.

title: Produce Clerk
description: Job Summary: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors. Merchandising, Filling, Stocking, Breaking Down & Storing Loads, Culling Product, Rotating Product, Preparation of Product, Trimming, Crisping etc..

title: Meat Clerk
description: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors. Meat Processing, Wrapping, Pricing, Merchandising, Cleaning, Sanitation, Stocking Deli, Receiving Product, Tracking Invoicing, Maintaining Accurate Inventories.

title: Grocery Clerk
description: To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors.  Merchandising, Stocking, Rotating Product, Facing, Cashier, Bagging, and Cleaning,

title: Front End Clerk
description:
Job Summary:
To Provide World Famous Friendly Customer Service to Customers, Team Members & Outside Vendors. Cashier, Bagging, Cleaning, Merchandising, Stocking, Rotating Product, Facing.

title: Yard/Warehouse Rep I
description: The Yard/Warehouse Rep I receives, stocks, ships, orders and counts inventory items. This is an entry level position that is responsible for the safe operation of a forklift in order to stock all lumber and building materials. Perform duties within the established work and safety procedures.

title: Sales Associate
description: Join the Pet Station Pack! We're not just a team, we're a pack dedicated to supporting each other, providing outstanding care to animals, and delivering an exceptional experience to every customer. As a Sales Associate at Pet Station, you'll be the friendly face and knowledgeable resource for our customers and their furry, scaled, or feathered friends. You'll guide customers to the perfect products, ensure their smooth checkout experience, and maintain a welcoming and organized store environment. You'll also play a vital role in caring for our in-store animals, ensuring their health and happiness. With a passion for pets and a commitment to exceptional service, you'll be a key member of our team!
